description: You are a film music editor preparing a cinematic trailer cue in the Ardour session 'MyProject' (/home/ga/Audio/sessions/MyProject/MyProject.ardour). Rename the audio track to 'Trailer Score'. Create gain automation with at least four breakpoints: silence at 0s, full volume at ~6s, full volume at ~22s, and silence at ~28s. Create pan automation with at least three breakpoints: hard left at 0s, center at ~14s, and hard right at ~28s. Set both automation lanes to Play mode and save the session.
